name: Orange Roughy in Parchment
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 425 degrees F. (220 degrees C).
Cook carrots in 1/2 cup water for 5 minutes.
Drain and set aside. Cut parchment or foil into 2 large pieces.
Place half of the carrots and peas in center of foil.
Place one fillet on top of vegetables.
Pour half of lime juice over fillet and sprinkle with paprika.
Scatter sliced olives and capers over fillet.
Sprinkle chopped parsley over capers.
Fold edges of parchment or foil to enclose fillet and seal.
Place on baking sheet and bake 8 to 10 minutes.
Serve by opening packet slightly, allowing steam to escape.
